[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Spilik''' was [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer just prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Biography==
Spilik was [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Karg]]'s second-in-command during a mission to [[Kattada/Legends|Kattada]] to arrest [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. During the subsequent [[Battle of Kattada|battle]], he commanded the Imperial force following Karg's death and the destruction of their [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]]. When the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] and their Kattadan allies made a ground assault on the Imperials, he was shot [[Death/Legends|dead]]. With his death, the remaining Imperials surrendered.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 5|''Empire'' 5]] {{1st}}
*[[Empire 6|''Empire'' 6]]
